hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of National Hairstylist Appreciation Day, Hairspray is a fun and energetic film that celebrates the power of hair and hairstylists in the 1960s. With its upbeat music and dance numbers, it's the perfect film to appreciate the art of hairstyling.
hero.blurb: Hairspray is a classic musical comedy that will have you dancing in your seat. With its talented cast, including John Travolta and Queen Latifah, this film is a must-see for anyone who loves music and dance.

released.title: Shrek
released.reason: Released today in 2001, Shrek is a classic animated film that has become a beloved favorite among both children and adults. Released today in 2001, this film's unique blend of humor and pop culture references has made it a standout in the world of animation.
released.blurb: Shrek is a hilarious and irreverent film that pokes fun at traditional fairy tales. With its talented voice cast, including Mike Myers and Eddie Murphy, this film is a must-see for anyone who loves animation and comedy.

birthday.title: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Carey Lowell, born May 18, 1961. This film is a fun and spooky anthology that showcases Lowell's acting talents in a unique and entertaining way.
birthday.blurb: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie is a classic horror anthology that features a talented cast, including Carey Lowell. With its blend of humor and horror, this film is a must-see for fans of the genre.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: This notoriously bad action film has gained a cult following for its over-the-top action sequences and cringe-worthy dialogue, making it a must-see for fans of so-bad-it's-good cinema.
awful.blurb: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever is a hilariously bad film that is filled with cheesy one-liners and ridiculous action sequences. With its low budget and poor production quality, this film is a laughable mess that is sure to entertain.
